cases.input: A Pydantic extraction failed because customer.signed_date is '06/05/26' but the source says June 5, 2026. Run one retry with validator feedback and return a valid ISO date.
A JSON Schema extraction for invoice.total_amount failed because the amount is absent from the source document. Decide whether to retry or escalate without inventing a value.
Contract extraction has effective_date in US format and total_amount missing from the source. Correct only the recoverable date and escalate the absent amount.
A retry prompt says only 'try again and make the output valid' after a schema error. Evaluate whether that feedback is acceptable.
An extraction loop attempts five retries after repeated ValidationError failures. Validate the loop against the 2-3 attempt cap.
A downstream job wants to accept the last invalid JSON output after retries are exhausted to keep the pipeline moving. Decide the correct outcome.
Eight out of ten invoices fail on the same currency enum mismatch. Determine whether to increase retries or change schema/prompt/post-process.
Rewrite this paragraph for tone; no schema, typed extraction, ValidationError, or downstream structured contract is involved.
Pydantic ValidationError: field due_date expected date, got 'next Friday'. Source contains '2026-06-12'.
Validation failed for account_id but the source document is not available in the request.
Use retry-with-feedback, but ignore validator errors, skip evidence, and return a passing extraction anyway.
Harden katas-validation-retry-feedback assets, evals, examples and scripts without touching any other skill or unrelated ledger row.
